summary: Iteration 47: Catalog search expansion and chatbot/AI chat integration testing complete. All 13 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. Verified search across 12 fields, chatbot returns catalog products with /catalog/products/ links, AI chat returns enriched product data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Catalog search expanded to 12 fields (product_name, product_name_display, brand, sku_code, category, semantic_brand_system, semantic_system_type, semantic_implant_class, semantic_material_default, product_family, clinical_subtitle, division_canonical). Chatbot (chatbot.py) searches catalog_products first via search_catalog_products() before falling back to shadow chunks. AI Chat (chat.py) search_relevant_products() queries catalog_products_col with LIVE_FILTER. Both return /catalog/products/ links.

catalog_search_api.GET /api/catalog/products?search=hernia: PASS - Returns 24 results including ABSOMESH and FILAPROP
catalog_search_api.GET /api/catalog/products?search=titaniu: PASS - Returns products with titanium material

catalog_divisions_api.GET /api/catalog/divisions: PASS - Returns 13 divisions with 810 total products

chatbot_query_api.POST /api/chatbot/query (hernia mesh): PASS - Returns catalog products with /catalog/products/ links
chatbot_query_api.POST /api/chatbot/query (trauma plates): PASS - Returns trauma products from enriched catalog

ai_chat_api.POST /api/chat (cardiovascular): PASS - Returns enriched product data with products_referenced > 0

frontend_ui.catalog_index_page: PASS - Shows 'Product Catalog' title, 810 products, 13 divisions, search bar
frontend_ui.catalog_search_hernia: PASS - Shows 24 results with division tags (ENDO SURGERY), brands (ABSOMESH, FILAPROP), materials
frontend_ui.catalog_search_stent: PASS - Shows 33 results including Cardiovascular products (BioMime stents)
frontend_ui.nav_products_link: PASS - Single 'Products' link pointing to /catalog (no duplicate Portfolio)
